operational_knowledge_units.title: Database connectivity check during unplanned restart handling
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that during an unplanned restart scenario, an operator should remote into the specified WCS host and verify that SQL Server Management Studio can connect.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'Open Sql server management studio and'
Visible text: 'check that you can connect'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Services unplanned restart diagnostic concept: RDP into fortna-wcs-primary.txrth.otnet.ups.com, open SQL Server Management Studio, and verify that a connection can be made.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Verify SQL connectivity from the primary WCS server during an unplanned restart
preconditions: An unplanned restart scenario is being investigated.
Remote desktop access to fortna-wcs-primary.txrth.otnet.ups.com is available.
SQL Server Management Studio is available on the target host.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide titled 'Services / Unplanned restart' with text instructing the user to RDP into fortna-wcs-primary.txrth.otnet.ups.com and open SQL Server Management Studio to check connectivity.

steps.expected_outcome: A remote session to the primary WCS host is established.
steps.visual_region_hint: Center text area containing the RDP host instruction.

steps.expected_outcome: SQL Server Management Studio is launched on the remote host.
steps.validation_check: The SQL Server Management Studio application is open.
steps.visual_region_hint: Center text area containing the SQL Server Management Studio instruction.

steps.instruction: Check that you can connect in SQL Server Management Studio.
steps.expected_outcome: A successful SQL connection can be established from the primary WCS host.
steps.validation_check: SQL Server Management Studio shows a successful connection rather than a connection failure.
steps.visual_region_hint: Center text area containing the connectivity check instruction.

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Diagnostic check for services unplanned restart: RDP into fortna-wcs-primary.txrth.otnet.ups.com, open SQL Server Management Studio, and verify that SQL connectivity works.
